incident.summary: Five XAUUSD BUY positions opened in a 30-minute window from the same H1 demand zone all hit SL simultaneously for a combined -$212.25 loss. The R4 v5 anti-stack gate (check_concurrent_cap + check_anti_stack_cooldown) was added in the post-mortem to prevent recurrence.
incident.evidence: data/vps_snapshot/XAUUSD/journal/live_trades.jsonl (production journal — not in this repo) showed 5 RANGE BUY entries between 02:18 and 02:44 UTC, all SL'd between 03:01 and 03:14.
